title: Savage Island Part 1
author: Scott Adams
objective: Survive on a savage island and find a way into the volcano.
key_mechanics: Hurricane survival: A hurricane hits the island periodically. You must shelter in the stone head or die.
One-way volcano entry: Sliding into the volcano via loose ash is practically one-way. Prepare fully before entering.
Swimming/drowning: Carrying too many items while swimming causes drowning. Drop items on shore first.
Bear encounter: The bear in the deep cave can kill you. Use items strategically to deal with it.
Raft building: Build a raft from logs and vines to reach the offshore atoll.
Cave maze: Rooms 25-28, 33 form a maze with self-loops. Drop items to map your path.
Display case traps: Both sealed display cases (rooms 20 and 21) kill you if you press the button (MOVE BUTT).
Force field puzzle: The control console in room 29 operates the force field blocking the alien inner sanctum.
Tidal mechanics: The tide rises and falls, affecting beach access and available items.
Coconuts for sustenance: GET COCO from the palm tree top (room 19) for food and drink on the island.
Pirate ship timing: The pirate ship appears on the beach - YOHO or ARGH to interact.
Sleep danger: Sleeping on the volcano ledge (room 18) is fatal - you roll off and die.

walkthrough.result: Survey the main beach. Note the stone head, jungle, and ocean.
Dig in sand to find items washed ashore.
Pick up the bottle (contains rum or is empty).
Examine the bottle - may contain a note or rum.
Drink the rum if present, freeing the bottle for water.
Go south to the beach with the lagoon.
Beach area south of main beach. Note surroundings.
Go west to the dense jungle.
Collect vines from the jungle - needed for raft building.
Return east to beach.
Go north to main beach.
Go east to the jungle.
Climb the palm tree to the top.
Take the coconuts for food and liquid.
Climb back down to the jungle.
Collect a log for raft building.
Return to main beach.
Build a raft from logs and vines. Need both items.
Climb the stone head to look around.
From atop the head, see the atoll offshore.
Climb down from the stone head.
Board the raft you built.
Paddle toward the atoll. Hard to steer!
Dig in the sand on the atoll to find buried items.
Collect whatever was buried on the atoll.
Board the raft to return to the main island.
Head south toward the volcano area.
Continue south to the large plain.
Climb the extinct volcano to the rim.
CRITICAL: Save before entering volcano - it's one-way!
Slide down into the volcano on loose ash. One-way trip!
Enter the lake inside the volcano.
Dive to the lake bottom to explore.
Explore underwater - find hidden items.
Explore north underwater - find more items.
Return to the lake surface before drowning.
Swim to the ledge on the volcano wall.
Squeeze through the narrow crevice.
Enter the deep cave from the volcano.
Take the fish bones from the cave.
Enter the crevice to reach the metal tunnels.
Go north in the metal tunnel.
Go west to the force field room.
Examine the control console that operates the force field.
Operate the console dials to deactivate the force field.
Pull the lever on the console.
Pass through the deactivated force field.
Go east to the dimly lit rock room.
Go south to the alien machinery room.
Examine the alien machinery. Critical for endgame.
Return north.
Go west back to metal tunnel.
Go south to tunnel hub.
Go south to ancient cave.
Break the stalactite to get a sharp tool.
Go south to the beach by ocean.
Survey the far beach. The adventure continues in Savage Island Part 2.
Check your score. Survival IS the goal of Part 1.

common_mistakes: Entering the volcano without all needed supplies - the ash slide is one-way and you cannot climb back out.
Swimming while carrying too many items - you will drown. Drop items on shore before entering the lake.
Pressing buttons on the sealed display cases (MOVE BUTT in rooms 20 and 21) - instant death both times.
Sleeping on the volcano wall ledge (room 18) - you roll off and die. Never SLEE there.
Not sheltering in the stone head during the hurricane - being outside when it hits is fatal.
Forgetting to collect vines AND logs before trying to build the raft - you need both materials.
Not exploring the lake bottom (SWIM DOWN from room 12) - hidden items are found by swimming EAST and NORTH underwater.
Getting lost in the cave maze (rooms 25-28, 33) without dropping items to mark your path.
Not saving before entering the volcano - if you forgot something, there's no way back up.
Drinking the rum too late - you need the empty bottle to collect water from the lake.
WITH HAND on the sandy cliff edge (room 32) can be fatal - JUMP is the safe way down to the beach.
